commands: uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 webhook create --topic cert.created --endpoint-url https://hooks.example.com/notify --secret wh-secret-xyz
uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 webhook get --id wh-20260326-001
next_steps: webhook 已成功创建，id 为 wh-20260326-001，当前状态 active
已通过 webhook get 确认记录存在且字段正确，验证生效
当系统触发 cert.created 事件时，将使用密钥 wh-secret-xyz 签名并向 https://hooks.example.com/notify 发送回调
如需查看所有 webhook：uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 webhook list
